title: Alysia SMP | Modded
description: The more modded variant of the Alysia SMP Vanilla+ modpack!
body:
# Alysia SMP - Modded!  

Alysia SMP is an LGBTQ+ friendly survival modded multiplayer community all about having fun together. We're big on player communication and keeping the server player-driven.  

This pack leans pretty heavy on the technical side, so if you like automating, tinkering, and diving into complex mods, you’ll feel right at home. Of course, we’ve also got some fun and cozy stuff to balance it out.  

Some of what you’ll find here:  
* Proximity voice chat for hanging out in-game  
* Farmer's Delight (and other cooking mods) for some fun cooking options
* Tons of technical mods like Create, Arcana, and plenty more for late-game progression  
* QoL mods like Jade and JEI to improve some of the core things with Minecraft  

The server is whitelist-only, just to make sure everyone’s here for the right reasons and not to cause trouble.  

If this sounds like your thing, hop in at [smp.alysia.online](http://smp.alysia.online) (Discord link).
